name: Green Movement Protests
description: Following the disputed June 2009 presidential election in which incumbent [Mahmoud Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad) was declared the winner over reformist candidates [Mir-Hossein Mousavi](/people/mir-hossein-mousavi) and [Mehdi Karroubi](/people/mehdi-karroubi), millions of Iranians took to the streets in the largest protests since the 1979 revolution. The government response was violent; the [Basij](/orgs/basij) and [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) killed dozens of protesters. The movement was suppressed by late 2009, and its leaders Mousavi and Karroubi were placed under house arrest in 2011.
editorial_notes: Key event for understanding factions: splits moderate conservatives from hardliners, and establishes Mousavi/Karroubi as opposition figures.
